raw_text: Very disappointing experience with Blinkit. The UPI payment option wasn't available while placing my order, so I added money to my Blinkit Wallet. Even then, the app showed the service as unavailable and wouldn't let me place the order. My money is stuck, and there was no proper customer support to help. No response, no initiative to resolve the issue, and a very poor overall experience. Blinkit needs to improve both its payment system and customer service. they don't deserve even single star

I am writing to report that the proudct was arrived damaged/defective. Not responding ur support system. what it's behaviour to customer for complaint about product and your not respond. I have very bad experience in blinkit. it's customers care are not responding with customer problem it's totally unacceptable behaviour through reputated app. I was very disappointed with resolution. I want my refund money immediately. it's not first time not responding my complaints.

I have noticed one thing if Blinkit makes a mistake such as sending a different item than the one you ordered they will stand by you without citing terms and conditions. However, if you are the one placed wrong order, they immediately start quoting terms and conditions to the customer. I very disappointed with customer resolution today I get. I think am your good customer you guys will give little bit favour. I really understand the customer support with I got today. Use flipkart Min or Amazon
Never disappointed me. Always on time, even they tried to reach in time when there is rain. All the required products can be found in this platform. Really loved it. Thanks.

The applications are good and also mostly delivered at time but there would always be a problem I have received damaged packing expired products These support executives are literally un helpful sometimes those keep on telling the same point and some time we are not helpful at all and mostly the mistakes are done at one specific location i have ordered items from my college and other locations they are literally excellent but near the house area are literally disgusting

Very disappointing experience with Blinkit. My payment was deducted but the order was not placed, and I still have not received my refund. There is no proper customer service available to speak to or resolve issues. If customers face problems, whom should we contact for help? Please improve your support service and process my refund soon.

I would definitely say, that I love this app! It have literally everything which is needed in our daily life,and how they don't pressure the delivery partners with time delaying and all. Sometimes,they forget items,it happened with me 3-4 times but, they always solve it! I love how they say sorry and take care after the mistake. This app is very useful and respectful. I love it!

I'll give 3 star to blinkit because There are always extra charges in this. I just ordered 2 items and calculated the price of both and the amount was different and in blinkit the total amount was more than that.

"If delivery is not possible at an address, the app should not allow the order to be placed in the first place. The delivery partner refused to deliver the order, and customer service canceled it, but I was still charged a cancellation fee. Why should the customer pay when Blinkit is the one canceling the order?" worst worst worst service

I ordered a 1L Amul Butterscotch ice cream tub, but the box was completely open and in a very bad condition. Is this the kind of service you provide? Imagine having guests at home and receiving such a surprise at the door. It’s really disappointing and makes no sense. Please look into this issue, boss.

Fast delivery but not the best for food and perishables. Every single time i have bought food items, it is either crushed, dirty, spilling or old stock. I dont know if its just the outlet that delivers to Kokapet area, but their stocking sucks. Biscuit packets are crushed and therefore powdered, there is always goo or gunk or spillage on the packets of dosa batter and fridge items, things that were a day away from expiry and in general things just feel like they are not fresh or stocked well
i given 3 star because there are so many glitches in the app while payment. I did double payment onne time and I received a missing item in a shoe stand please fix this issue ok. Thank you

There service was good in the beginning now its getting worst and nowhere to write a complaint. such a disappointment 😞 I have been a loyal customer for years my last order includes the most delicate items like bread biscuits noodles along with most dense items like watermelon to my surprise all the 17 items got delivered tightly in one bag with heavy items on top of my roach infested bread and crumbled biscuits. this is not it, i have many more bad incidents in my past too.

One of the 3rd class customer support ZEPTO is Way More Convenient and Has Great Customer Support with Good Discounted price and if u received different item or damage item i have to just tell everything with 2 3 photos and u will get instant solution where as Blinkit u have to raise concern then they ask videos and photos after that e check and after 10 15 mins U they call and ask for replacement so u have to wait for replacement the guy come and take old item nd give new one so its toomuchbad

service is pathetic. such a bad service that grofers shouldn't be recommended . the order is delivered in parts.. orders are rescheduled on their own. they dnt even talk to the customer to confirm if the rescheduled time is feasible or not also blinkit promises for a refund for bad veggies but customer doesn't recieve it even after follow up for a month

nice delivery app for last minute needs...but recently I placed an order but it failed & the amount was debited from my account...even when I concerned with the help provided in the app it was like the amount will be debited back to u in 5-7 days...today is the 9th day bt there is no amount return from blinkit

Thanks, Blinkit! I paid for rotten vegetables, shared clear photos, and still got only a ₹55 refund for items worth ₹120 while replacing just 2 of the 4 spoiled items. That's a creative way to make customers pay for poor quality. Your bot-only support doesn't even let customers explain the issue properly or speak to a real person. The best resolution I found was uninstalling the Blinkit app. BigBasket clearly understands customer service much better.

This makes bringing groceries so easy. But as for Blinkit their prices are higher than its competitors and that's why I only visit it when the grocery is not available on Zepto. I hope the prices will go down because Blinkit has more options to buy from.

I have ordered an electric kettle through blink it. After opening the box the kettle was used and burnt from inside. i have tried multiple times to replace it but customer care replied with we are not able to verify the issue. I suggest not to buy any electric appliances through this platform.

No words to describe about this app everything is just 10 out 10 . The packages, delivery guy, customer service everything is just superb and the best part about this app is COD which is often available and very helpful for those people who doesn't use online payment. 👍🏻
